Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Blood Shadow]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — The Blood Shadow consumes everyone Yerin knows.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow feels like a liquid to the touch but leaves nothing on the skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — The Blood Shadow's fingertips are shaped by Yerin's sword madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow has awakened.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Blood Shadows are often puppets that cannot be controlled and act like bloodspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — The purpose of Blood Shadows is to feed their master.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — A Blood Shadow can be taken by sacred artists like pills to make them stronger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Dreadgods give birth to a litter of Blood Shadows that act like Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Blood Shadows seek hosts to drain them dry and return power to the Bleeding Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — The Skysworn sensed the presence of the Blood Shadow inside Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — The Blood Shadow is a parasite inside Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — A Blood Shadow was slipped into the Skysworn by Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — The Blood Shadow latched onto his arm, but a sheath of liquid yellow madra protected him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow is a spiritual parasite that attempts to drain its host dry and wear them like a suit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow is a spiritual parasite that can contort into a humanoid shape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow can become a blood-clone of its host.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow grabbed Lindon by the collar and slammed him into a wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow is a technique or entity that Yerin can control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow can form a red line between Yerin and the shadow.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — A Blood Shadow is considered a potentially dangerous liability by the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — A young woman used Blood Shadow as a cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — The Blood Shadow looks like a Remnant version of Yerin with jagged angles and red paint.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — The Blood Shadow has two thin arms that flatten into blades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow can cling to a target like a monkey to a tree, driving its clawed hands and Goldsigns into their body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — A Blood Shadow can fight independently.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — A Blood Shadow is a power that resides inside a person.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Longhook possesses a Blood Shadow that can mimic his actions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin possesses a Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow can appear as a red-tinted shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Yan Shoumei uses Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow is something she is uncomfortable talking about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow is something Yerin must get used to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow can spread Goldsigns.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — The Sage of Red Faith cultivated a Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — A Blood Shadow can be upgraded using a Heaven's Drop.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — The Blood Shadow is a featureless red copy of Yerin with six red blades on its back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — The Blood Shadow can feed on life aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — The Blood Shadow is a parasitic spirit that can act as a mirror of its host.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — The Blood Shadow's Goldsigns are six-bladed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — The Blood Shadow can potentially break away from its host if allowed too much freedom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — The Blood Shadow has a nightmarish voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — The Blood Shadow can speak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow is very strong and can speak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — The Blood Shadow is a red-handed entity that rose from Yerin's chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — The Blood Shadow is a copy of Meira with bright red hair and pink skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — The Blood Shadow has red irises and almost white eye whites.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — The Blood Shadow wears crimson sacred artist's robes and has six metallic red blades on its back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — The Blood Shadow uses a pink-bladed copy of Yerin's master's sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow was growling in defiance.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — The Blood Shadow is a parasite that acts as a copy of the user in shades of red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin has an unrevealed ability called Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — The Blood Shadow is a spiritual copy of the user in shades of crimson.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — The Blood Shadow is a spirit that accompanies Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — The Blood Shadow is a parasite.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — A Blood Shadow can count as a second sacred artist in battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Yan Shoumei's Blood Shadow hung around her like a cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Blood Shadow is a technique or advancement related to the Phoenix and Monarch levels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Yan Shoumei's Blood Shadow is described as monstrous and a mystery.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Blood Shadow is a mass of blood madra that acts as a parasite.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Blood Shadow is hungry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — The Blood Shadow escaped from Yerin's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — The Blood Shadow speaks in a broken voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow is a dormant entity inside Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow dashed after Calan Archer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow used the Endless Sword and a black blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow has ruby eyes and bright red hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow tossed a red-tinged Rippling Sword at Calan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow is an exception to the Frozen Blade technique's restriction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow can steal power by killing or possessing others to bring it back to the Bleeding Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow licked its lips and patted its belly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — The Blood Shadow is a state of existence that can be improved for willpower training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Blood Shadow would make surviving the Madra Engine for a year unlikely.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — The Blood Shadow is a spirit with red hair that uses no techniques and is being battered in the sword training area.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — The Blood Shadow was blindfolded and balanced a dark, shimmering brick in its lap.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — The Blood Shadow cycles aura under its own power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — The Blood Shadow uses a black sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — There are three methods for cultivating a Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow uses a Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — The Blood Shadow's body can re-form after its head is destroyed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Ruby is a Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Ruby is a Blood Shadow that has not yet evolved a true human body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Yan Shoumei was named her Blood Shadow well.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — A Blood Shadow is a type of spirit that can manifest a human form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Blood Shadow is considered evil and vicious.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — The Blood Shadow is someone Ruby might return to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Yerin can send power to her Blood Shadow using the Blood Sage's technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — A Blood Shadow can attempt to take over a person's body.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin merged with her Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — A tenth victim of Phoenix fragments can become a Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow contains the power of the Phoenix.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — The two Overlords carry weapons shrouded in Blood Shadows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — A Blood Shadow can cover a sword.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — A Blood Shadow can consume a leviathan and turn it into a husk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Blood Shadow is a monstrous blob-like entity in the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — An Archlady has a Blood Shadow in the form of a snake.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Blatantly killing and feeding on another's Blood Shadow is grounds for expulsion from the sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — A raw Shadow from the Phoenix is easier to digest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — A Blood Shadow is a ring-shaped entity that beats with the host's heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — A Blood Shadow is a symbiotic spirit that takes on the traits of whatever it feeds upon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — A Blood Shadow is a technique or entity that can cover a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Blood Shadows are associated with Redmoon Hall members.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow eventually became Ruby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — A Blood Shadow was melting away from a mace made of dark metal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — The Remnant claims to have planted a Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — A Blood Shadow can take the form of a sacred artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Blood Shadow killed Yerin's family.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Blood Shadow is a technique that can manifest with independence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei can use her Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — The Blood Shadow is a power held by Yan Shoumei that represents the majority of her power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Blood Shadow is a type of entity or role that Crusher belongs to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei has a Blood Shadow nestled in her soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kahn Mala has a Blood Shadow in the shape of a cobra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kahn Mala has a Blood Shadow.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
